sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57189" key="khriokle/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηριο-κλέπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n57189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stealer of honeycombs</tr_>, title of Theocritus' nineteenth Idyll.</sense> </entryFree>
